Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 68 9.4.13 Emergency Diesel Generating Set 9.4.13.1 Alternator i) Carbon brushes for Generator, and self starter motor 10 sets ii) Current Transformers of each rating 1 set iii) Instruments of each range 1 set iv) Relays of each type 1 set v) Timers 1 set vi) Indicating light 1 set vii) Fuses of each rating 2 sets viii) Space heaters with thermostat and isolating switch 1 set ix) Cubicle illuminating lights 1 set x) Terminal blocks 1 set 9.4.13.2 Diesel engine i) Fuel injection nozzles 2 sets ii) Crank shaft with standard size journals 1 no. iii) Main bearings 1 set iv) Big-end bearings 1 set v) Diesel filter packs 20 nos. vi) Mobile oil filter packs 20 nos. vii) V-belt for radiator fan 5 nos. viii) Fuel injector 2 nos. ix) Fuel injection piping 1 set x) Ring gear for fly wheel 1 no. xi) Starter 1 no. xii) Nozzle tester, barring bar, slings, eyebolts and other special equipment necessary for servicing the engine 1 set 9.4.13.3 AMF panel i) Protective relay of each type 1 no. ii) Auxiliary relay of each type 1 no. iii) Timer of each type 2 nos. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 69 9.5 CONTROL AND INSTRUMENTATION (FOR EACH UNIT) 9.5.1 Distributed Digital Control Monitoring & Information System (DDCMIS) i) Keyboards/ mouse a) Keyboard 3 nos. of each type. b) Mouse 3 nos. of each type. ii) CRT color monitor 10% or 1 no. of each model and size whichever is more. iii) Printers and their parts a) Color Inkjet printers 10% of installed quantity or 1 No. whichever is more b) Color laser printer (A4) -do- c) Color laser printer (A3) -do- d) Dot matrix
